# ArcadeBloom

> A curated directory of free browser games. We review web games and link to each author's own site — we do not host third-party games. Every entry has a verifiable source (author, play URL, licence).

ArcadeBloom catalogues 389+ browser games across six categories: Puzzle, Action, Arcade, Strategy, Racing & Sports, and Simulation. The catalogue is seeded from three source classes: open-source GitHub game collections, independent author sites, and js13kGames competition entries.

## What this site is

- A **game directory** (not a portal): we discover, review, and link out. We never host or iframe third-party games.
- Each game page has: an honest review (About), a how-to-play guide (controls + strategy), key features, source attribution (author, URL, licence), and an outbound "Play on [source]" link.
- We do not fabricate play counts or ratings — removed per our design principles.

## Key pages

- [Home](/): category portal with editor's picks, browse-by-category, and latest additions
- [Featured games](/featured/): hand-picked standout titles
- [New games](/new/): most recent additions, ordered by date
- [Browse by category](/category/arcade/): Puzzle, Action, Arcade, Strategy, Racing & Sports, Simulation
- [Search](/search/): full-text search across the catalogue
- [About](/about/): what ArcadeBloom is (and is not)
- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): all indexable URLs

## Categories

- [Puzzle](/category/puzzle/): logic, numbers, patterns, spatial reasoning
- [Action](/category/action/): shooters, fighters, reflex-driven combat
- [Arcade](/category/arcade/): classic, retro, score-attack, js13k jam entries
- [Strategy](/category/strategy/): tower defense, tactics, resource management
- [Racing & Sports](/category/racing-sports/): speed and athletic competition
- [Simulation](/category/simulation/): idle, management, sandbox, life-sim

## How we curate

Every entry must have a recorded, verifiable source. We link out with `rel="noopener nofollow"` and transparent attribution. If we cannot verify where a game came from, we do not list it. See our [architectural decisions](https://github.com/dgyy/ArcadeBloom-/tree/main/docs/adr) for the positioning and taxonomy decisions.

## Seed sources

1. Open-source GitHub game collections (MIT/GPL/etc.)
2. Independent author sites (hextris.io, proxx.app, etc.)
3. js13kGames competition entries (2012–2025, 2483 entries total)
